comment: Kibana Detection Rule — SSH / RDP Brute Force
description: Import via Kibana > Security > Rules > Import

rules.name: SSH Brute Force — Multiple Failed Logins
rules.description: Detects more than 5 failed SSH login attempts from the same source IP within 60 seconds.

rules.name: Windows RDP Brute Force — Multiple 4625 Events
rules.description: Detects more than 5 Windows failed logon events (EventID 4625) from the same source within 60 seconds.

rules.name: Successful Login After Multiple Failures (Brute Force Success)
rules.description: Detects a successful logon (4624) shortly after multiple failed logons (4625) from the same IP — indicates likely successful brute force.
rules.query: sequence by winlog.event_data.IpAddress with maxspan=2m [any where winlog.event_id == 4625] with runs=5 [any where winlog.event_id == 4624]
